qualitative_gate_conditions.note: iter-09 (closed-fixed, GATE MET) applied the user-chosen run-6 APP READ-PATH DEMO-PATCH (option (c) from the iter-08 user-blocker): a new app injection demo-patch (app-aireadiness-snapshot-loadmembers) that bounds the unbounded loadMembers(orgID, "") whole-org hydration in buildResponseFromSnapshots (the frozen AI-readiness read path) to the ~199 snapshot users via the existing bounded sibling loadMembersByUserIDs — a PURE perf optimization (data-identical: the members map is keyed+looked-up by snapshot UserID), scoped to the snapshot read path. Authored via the app-targetrole-authz-skip precedent (pinned manifest + rext-owned apply-*.sh helper mirroring the swap + up-injected.sh inject-loop wiring). The cheap dual-endpoint probe CONFIRMED the fix: the frozen ?cycle=<closed> GET went 180s-timeout -> 19ms and the dashboard renders the full funnel (199 members, 78.4% stage-3). Gated manager sweep #1: 5 -> 1 (the 1 residual a MANIFEST false-fail — the ai-readiness-funnel header is one of two mutually-exclusive strings, 'Steps completion' link OR 'Stage breakdown' label, never both; the manager mode always renders 'Steps completion'). Harness fix (drop the impossible 'Stage breakdown' from the descriptor, keep the load-bearing Stage 1/2/3 + funnel-header proof). Sweep #2: (0,0), persona 0, escapes 0, frontier EXHAUSTED, reachable 70, gateMet=true, on a fresh demo-up. rext tagged fit-up-m51 (3733523); consumption clone re-pinned to the tag.
